name: era-365-orchestrator
description: ERA control plane — billing, identity, SSO, and tenancy orchestration

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @era365/database && npm run build -w @era365/mdm-database && npm run build -w @era365/api && npm run build -w @era365/web
scripts.db:generate: npm run db:generate -w @era365/database && npm run db:generate -w @era365/mdm-database
